metadata.description: A Claude Code harness for continuous work: file-based memory, confident context-clearing, subagent delegation, and a session-retrospective loop that improves the harness itself.

plugins.name: context-discipline
plugins.description: The memory + context loop: hooks watch context pressure, skills consolidate session knowledge into persistent memory, so you can /clear with confidence.

plugins.name: working-style
plugins.description: Skills that shape how work gets done: prompt structuring, aggressive simplification, and on-demand MCP activation to keep context lean.
